title: TrollPlayer
description: TrollPlayer is a Minecraft 1.20.1 mod for stealth and pranks. Spy on players and mute your sounds for ultimate trolling and mystery in multiplayer worlds.
body:
Key Features:

🔍 Invisible Spy Mode – Highlight any player with /spy <name> so only you can see them glowing.

🔇 Sound Vanishing – Go completely silent to others with /vs – no footsteps, no item sounds.

👻 Perfect Stealth – Move unseen and unheard without disrupting gameplay.

🎭 Ultimate Trolling – Craft hilarious, mind-blowing pranks that leave everyone guessing.

⚡ Lightweight & Optimized – Minimal impact on server performance.

🛡️ Safe for Servers – Clean, stable code with automatic cleanup and error prevention.

Detailed Features:
🕵️ Spy Command (/spy <playername>)

Invisible Tracking: Make players glow with an outline effect that only you can see.

Toggle Anytime: Run the command again to turn it off.

Track Multiple Players: Perfect for monitoring or mystery events.

Ideal For: Admin supervision, creating hidden roles in games, or just trolling your friends.

🤫 Vanish Sound Command (/vs)

Complete Silence: Footsteps, items, and movement sounds are gone for everyone but you.

Toggle On/Off: Switch between stealth and normal modes easily.

Smart System: Automatically cleans up to prevent memory issues.

Perfect For: Stealth missions, surprise pranks, and sneaky builds.

Best Use Cases:

✅ Admins: Monitor players secretly and catch griefers in action.

✅ Content Creators: Add suspense and mystery to your videos.

✅ Pranksters: Pull the ultimate stealth pranks on friends.

✅ Roleplayers: Perfect for assassin or spy-style characters.

✅ Mini-Game Designers: Great for murder mystery, hide-and-seek, or infiltration games.
